since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.93%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.94% · Gold +0.06% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.93%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.93%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -7.54%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +3.47%, OKTA +3.13%, BIDU +2.62%, WDAY +1.90%, AVAV +1.69%. Laggards: SKHY -7.54%, POWL -5.63%, MU -5.26%, TSM -5.05%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.32% at $134.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
